dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW, CAN YOU STILL STAND UP?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU MUST BE HONORED, 'CAUSE I'LL BE USING MY FEET NOW.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MY GRANDPA SAID YOU LEARNED TAEKWONDO. HE ASKED ME TO USE THEM ONLY FOR STRONG PEOPLE; WHICH MEANS I ACKNOWLEDGE YOU AS A STRONG MAN.

dialogue.speaker: Subordinate
dialogue.line: ALL INVITATIONS WERE DELIVERED TO THE PARTICIPANTS.

dialogue.speaker: Superior
dialogue.line: IS THE PERSON WHO BROKE YOUR ARM ONE OF THE PARTICIPANTS?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NO ONE KNOWS WHY HE CRIED OUT THAT NAME.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: THE STADIUM IS 30 SUBWAY STATIONS AWAY. WITH MY CALVES AND BICYCLE PUT TOGETHER, I CAN GET THERE IN 30 MINUTES!!

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: MY LEGS ARE FASTER THAN THE TRAIN! MY SHOULDERS ARE STRONGER THAN CAST IRON!

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: MY BABY'S MONEY FOR THE SURGERY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: IN THIS MOMENT, MANY THOUGHTS PASSED THROUGH MORI JIN'S MIND.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: I SHOULD BUY NEW CLOTHES FOR MY GRANDSON.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: WHAT KIND OF KIMBAP IS THIS?!

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: CACKLE! THIS IS A PIECE OF CAKE!

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: SINCE I WAS YOUNG, MY FAMILY WAS POOR.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: WE'VE NEVER BEEN OUT TO EAT LIKE THE OTHERS.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: MOM SAID WHERE IS THIS SOUND COMING FROM? IT MAKES ME SAD.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: MOM SAID THAT SHE HATES JAJANGMYEON.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: WE LOVE THAT, BUT WE REGRET WE SMILE LIKE THAT AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THOUGH THEY LOOK NOTHING ALIKE, THIS IS GOD (THE K-POP GROUP WHO SINGS THIS SONG).

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: WHAT THE?! YOU DAMN THIEF WHO APPEARED FOR THE SAKE OF THE STORY! DARN IT!!

dialogue.speaker: Thief
dialogue.line: EXCUSE ME. I'M SORRY, BUT COULD YOU HELP ME WITH DIRECTIONS? I'M TRYING TO GO HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: YOU BASTARDS, I'LL MAKE YOU REPAY ME IN DOUBLE!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: MOONLIGHT SWORD STYLE NO. 14 DANCE: BOOMERANG

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: I FINALLY GOT YOU! YOU PECKLESS GANGSTER!

dialogue.speaker: Mysterious Helper
dialogue.line: FOOL! I'M CHASING A THIEF RIGHT NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Mysterious Helper
dialogue.line: THEN, I'LL HELP YOU AS AN APOLOGY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: WHAT SCENES WERE CUT FROM THE MIDDLE FOR THIS TO HAPPEN?! I KNOW! HAHAHAHA! THIS IS A COMIC, BUT... HAHAHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: LET'S TAKE ANOTHER SLOW LOOK FOR THE READERS WHO DIDN'T GET IT!

dialogue.speaker: Mysterious Helper
dialogue.line: FOOL, I'M TRYING TO CATCH A THIEF RIGHT NOW!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TODAY'S LESSON: THE TRUTH ALWAYS PREVAILS!

dialogue.speaker: Jin Mori
dialogue.line: I'LL CREATE SOME DISTANCE WITH MY CORNERING SKILLS!

dialogue.speaker: Thief
dialogue.line: IT'S ALL MINE! ALL MINE! YIPPEE! MONEY!

dialogue.speaker: Superior
dialogue.line: HA! HAHA HAHA! MAY GOD PROTECT US! OUR LAND PROSPERS!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: LATER, THERE WAS HEARTWARMING NEWS IN THE EVENING PAPER.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NEWSPAPER ARTICLE: The thief caught. Victim's pet stolen, $100. To the hospital. In the Friday afternoon, a long chase. Thief robbed citizen. People shouted. A 17-year-old caught himself after a chase. Old lady said help. Thief on when embossed shock. For $100, all he was. Police arrested. Citizen not make sense. Culprit underpaid. Damage costing $45,000. How could this happen?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: OVERCOMING THE LIMITATIONS OF THE HUMAN BODY, THEY ARRIVED SAFE AND SOUND.

summary: The episode opens with a martial arts match, followed by Jin Mori's frantic rush to a stadium, filled with internal monologues about his past and family. He gets sidetracked by a thief, leading to a chaotic chase with the unexpected help of a mysterious individual, culminating in the thief's capture and a humorous newspaper report.
